headline: Couple's 'We Never Fight' Claim Tested By 47-Minute Argument About Whether They Actually Never Fight
summary: They are now fighting about the definition of fighting. The irony is lost on them.
fullBody: Megan and Jake NoFight posted 'we never fight' on Instagram. They immediately fought for 47 minutes about whether they 'never fight.' 'This isn't a fight,' Megan said. 'Yes it is,' Jake said. 'No it isn't,' Megan said. Their friends have started a betting pool. 'We have 'never fight' bingo,' one friend said. The couple is now in couples therapy. They fought about which therapist to choose.
